instructions_to_main_agent: This is a frontend-first luxury project. Prioritize visual polish, layout asymmetry, and motion over rapid backend integration.
Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for Headings and 'Manrope' for Body text. Use Google Fonts.
Install 'framer-motion' and '@studio-freight/lenis' for smooth scrolling and animations.
Use Lucide React icons with a stroke width of 1 or 1.5 for a delicate, premium look.
Follow the TETRIS grid mode for featured property layouts. Do not use equal square grids. Mix 3+ shapes.
Use Glassmorphism (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl) for the sticky nav and overlay cards over images.
Hero MUST use the provided video background with max black/40 overlay. Do not blanket overlay the image completely.
Never use pure black or gray, use tinting. Primary gold accent is #C8A96A.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Build the admin dashboard as a gated route with Shadcn components, but restyle them to fit the luxury theme.

scales.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none
scales.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-light tracking-tight leading-tight

sections_guidance.nav: Sticky with transparent-to-solid glass transition. z-50. Minimalist layout.
sections_guidance.hero: Cinematic fullscreen with video background. Use fallback image if video fails. H1 centered or left aligned with gold accents.
sections_guidance.featured_properties: Asymmetric Bento Grid (Tetris Mode) displaying luxury apartments and villas. High-quality images with hover-to-reveal details.
sections_guidance.mumbai_locations: Grid or horizontal scroll showcasing Bandra, Juhu, Worli, BKC, etc. Editorial style text overlay.
sections_guidance.why_choose_us: Dark section with large gold numbers (animated counters for stats). High contrast typography.
sections_guidance.buying_process: Vertical timeline with a 'Tracing Beam' glowing line connecting steps.
sections_guidance.testimonials: Carousel using Swiper or Framer Motion. Focus on avatar, serif quotes, luxury trust building.
sections_guidance.properties_listing: Advanced filters (Location, Type, Budget, BHK) built with Shadcn. Grid layout for properties.
sections_guidance.property_details: Lightbox gallery, amenities list, location highlights, and a sticky inquiry sidebar (glassmorphic).
sections_guidance.admin_dashboard: Gated by mock login. Clean, technical Swiss layout (Archetype 4 style but adapted to luxury color scheme). Use Shadcn heavily.

components_and_tech.styling: Tailwind CSS + HTML for marketing. Shadcn/UI for forms and admin.
components_and_tech.forms: Shadcn UI Input/Select heavily customized for luxury theme.

testing: All interactive elements must use data-testid (e.g. data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='property-filter-bhk', data-testid='admin-login-submit').
